title: UD Typology Table
summary: Demo notebook loading a curated 40-treebank subset of the UD Typological Classification Table. Demonstrates data structure inspection, coverage statistics (WALS case/word order, Glottolog family, modality), Pearson r cross-source validation between WALS case ordinal and UD case proportion, and a 4-panel matplotlib visualization of word order distribution, case marking categories, top language families, and the case correlation scatter plot.
